info.name: Hubspot Retrieve a Feature Flag Configuration

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs:
Retrieves the configuration for a specific feature flag associated with an application.
Returns the flag name, default state, and any override state configured.

info.name: Hubspot Create or Update a Feature Flag

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs:
Creates or updates a feature flag configuration for an application.
Set the default state that will apply to all portals unless overridden.

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs:
Deletes a feature flag from an application.
This will also remove all portal-level flag state overrides associated with this flag.

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.name: after
params.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results

items.docs:
Retrieves a paginated list of portal (account) flag states for a specific feature flag.
Returns all portals that have an explicit flag state override set.

info.name: Hubspot Retrieve a Portal Flag State

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: portalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot portal (account)

items.docs:
Retrieves the flag state for a specific portal (account).
Returns the current flag state override for the specified portal.

info.name: Hubspot Set a Portal Flag State

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: portalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot portal (account)

items.docs:
Sets the flag state override for a specific portal (account).
This overrides the application-level default state for this portal only.

info.name: Hubspot Delete a Portal Flag State

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: portalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot portal (account)

items.docs:
Removes the flag state override for a specific portal (account).
The portal will revert to using the application-level default flag state.

info.name: Hubspot Batch Create or Update Portal Flag States

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs:
Sets flag states for multiple portals (accounts) in a single request.
Efficiently enables or disables features for multiple accounts at once.

info.name: Hubspot Batch Delete Portal Flag States

params.name: appId
params.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

params.name: flagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs:
Removes flag state overrides for multiple portals (accounts) in a single request.
All specified portals will revert to using the application-level default flag state.
